Remarks by Vice President Vance at the National Conservatism Conference

April 22, 2026

VICE PRESIDENT VANCE: Thank you all for being here today. I'm honored to address this conference.

"We will rebuild American manufacturing, and I will sign every executive order necessary to bring jobs back to the heartland," Vance said.

"Our trade policy must put American workers first, before any multinational corporation," he added.

The Vice President announced that the administration has approved a new tariff schedule on imported steel, effective May 1, 2026.
